failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments: missing required string item_id and wrong product_id value/type.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to retrieve the price of item 2177997696 using ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id. The required information was already available in index 1: item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452". At index 2, the agent produced malformed tool arguments: {"product_id": 0}, omitting the required item_id and changing product_id from a string ID to numeric 0. The tool then explicitly rejected this as a SchemaError at index 3.
